headline: Does Goldman Sachs (GS) Offer Value After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Goldman Sachs Group's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article is here to unpack what the market might be pricing in. The stock recently closed at US$782.21, with a 7 day return of 4.8% decline, a 30 day return of 17.2% decline and a year to date return of 14.5% decline, set against a 47.5% gain over 1 year, a very large 3 year return that is roughly 2.8x, and a 5 year return of 156.3%. These moves sit against a...

headline: Geopolitical risk shocks S&P 500 as Goldman warns of oil-driven GDP drag
summary: Investing.com -- The S&P 500 has faced a turbulent week of trading, mirroring historical equity market behavior during periods of acute geopolitical risk, according to a new report from Goldman Sachs Group Inc (NYSE:GS). The benchmark index has declined by 2% amid heightened volatility.
